positive: A minimalist, stylized symmetrical illustration of a crescent moon cradling a bioluminescent nebula swirl and intricate geometric mandalas. The style is modern tattoo art mixed with celestial watercolor wash. Composition should be perfectly centered and isolated on a solid negative space background. Use strong negative and positive contrast, with deep indigo and royal violet gradients dominating the celestial elements, accented by pops of glowing emerald green and gold leaf detailing. Clean linework, highly decorative, suitable for a single, impactful print area.
negative: text, words, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, low detail, blur, grain, dirty, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, realistic photograph, grainy
